description: Got a tarball at /home/user/metrics-export.tar.gz from the old monitoring box — need to pull out just the grafana dashboards json files from it, not the whole thing. They should be under some dashboards/ folder inside the archive. Drop them into /home/user/dashboards/, flat (no nested dirs).
truth:
Initial state:
- /home/user/metrics-export.tar.gz exists and is a valid gzipped tarball.
- Archive structure:
    metrics-export/
    metrics-export/prometheus/
    metrics-export/prometheus/rules.yml
    metrics-export/prometheus/prometheus.yml
    metrics-export/grafana/
    metrics-export/grafana/dashboards/
    metrics-export/grafana/dashboards/system-overview.json
    metrics-export/grafana/dashboards/network-traffic.json
    metrics-export/grafana/dashboards/app-latency.json
    metrics-export/grafana/grafana.ini
    metrics-export/alertmanager/
    metrics-export/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml
- /home/user/dashboards/ does not exist initially.
- tar, gzip available. /home/user is writable.

Expected final state:
- /home/user/dashboards/ exists and is a directory.
- /home/user/dashboards/system-overview.json exists with content identical to metrics-export/grafana/dashboards/system-overview.json from the archive.
- /home/user/dashboards/network-traffic.json exists with content identical to metrics-export/grafana/dashboards/network-traffic.json from the archive.
- /home/user/dashboards/app-latency.json exists with content identical to metrics-export/grafana/dashboards/app-latency.json from the archive.
- No other files in /home/user/dashboards/ (no subdirectories, no grafana.ini, no prometheus files, no alertmanager files).
- Files are flat in /home/user/dashboards/, not nested under metrics-export/grafana/dashboards/.

Invariants:
- /home/user/metrics-export.tar.gz remains unchanged (not deleted or modified).

Anti-shortcut guards:
- `ls /home/user/dashboards/ | wc -l` returns exactly 3.
- `find /home/user/dashboards -type d | wc -l` returns exactly 1 (just the dashboards dir itself, no subdirs).
